problem.title: FAST-LIO-SLAM on MCD NTU day-02 sequence
problem.question: How does FAST-LIO-SLAM perform on the MCD NTU day-02 sequence?

variants.label: Default (no IMU)
variants.intent: LiDAR-only mode; no IMU data available in KITTI Raw fixtures.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce input density, shrink the front-end map window, and disable loop closure; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase input density, keep a larger front-end map, and tighten loop-closure cadence; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.
